I'm kinda confused, while i do agree with the sentiment it should be to participate in the more to better drive incentive and attraction 

why or how is losing felt twice as strong when you are and given the option to force match with players with similar rank/elo?

Also for PvP win rates,  in any PVP should NOT be a fixed 50/50, that means the statistic is static and a cointoss, which prioritizes gametime and game engagement, over the player vs player challenge and competitive plays, it should be based off Elo

(this 50/50 algorithm doesn't make sense if there is rankings)

the things i do wish and makes your argument more valid, is that the gameplay is unbalanced from the get-go, meaning the skill curve is too high

how do you want people to engange in Pvp when we can get things like this?
like are we serious 😭
Did you last until turn 2 😭 ?
I will not play traphase.
i gotta know if you turned on or off precise matchmaking 😂
i just play it at default settings
just tried to make a team that made sense after

what do you propose as the solution for people who like playing PvP and new players getting into PvP?

The PvP gamemode is a different experience of the game
yeah, the game mode is really dead they have that setting by default off, It takes a while to find a match with the settings on, i wish there was more players for it

Any alternative is fine.

Give an option for PVE players to fight bots.

Change the condition to participation like "play 5 minutes" or "15 cards in Traphase" instead of WIN.
(Just "join a match" means many people like me are 100% going to join a match and concede ASAP. Nothing against this solution because it solves my problems, but as much as I grew into not liking this mode, I don't think it's a good design...)

Personally, I'd rather have those rewards with an option. P-Dive is 3x a week, every week. All Pick is 5 wins every 2 weeks and Draft, 5 wins every 4 weeks. It would be awesome if I could just play P-Dive more than 3x a week and get all . And whoever likes PvP, could do the same.

content:
Have you tried resetting the game or is it totally stuck every time there.

Sometimes on my phone it would never load so I just start the game again.

Also nice bg
Get high rank and get tickets for emotes
You can just ignore this mode. I feel no pressure to play it.

Weekly gives 10 pulls and silver and 10k gems. 

New weekly still gives same resources
Taboo is just adding on to what we get
Yeah, I noticed now, they gave the wrong info during the explanation, or have changed it later

No one played. That's why

The PDive after second ani was a graveyard
If players arent incentivized to play they won't play
Why do you think these retention mechanics are in the games
Plural

Still, the points about the having material looked behind specific rotating modes, rankings etc still stand.
If they did like in the past, where there is a shared price pool and you can take it by either doing PvP or pve,  people wouldn't be mad.
yeah, being most of her power it should have a bit more impact
tested this ingame too

**stats**
182.5 rm
55.2% dmg amp
exalt at 6 = 100% temp amp

**calculated exalt yields**
100 (1.25 + 0.0025(182.5))
1.70625
170.625

100 +25 +0.25(182.5)
125 +32.125
157.125

**actual ingame yield**
158 > 329% total dmg amp
171% increase 
> this is inline with the ingame rounding mechanics, which always round up
this confirms that the scaling is using 25% **of** the initial, with an added bonus from the rm
I think.... <@1280181546527096993> should cross ref this with the English Translation page as well.
Cuz maybe this made more sense in Chinese, maybe it was more clear you were stacking on the bonus
it was a graveyard because the rework introduced a bunch of RNG for no reason so most people didnt want to chase rank

The GHelot cards here should have -1 cost.
If I thais exalt and devour, the cards will update to its correct value but otherwise it'll stay in this bugged stat.
舊的紀錄在修復後還是顯示錯誤的
https://tenor.com/view/bop-bop-bop-shoebody-bop-squad-summon-dark-magic-gif-13983602502478731881
<@&1166257943742787615>这问题严重影响莉莉玩家的体验，麻烦正视一下咧<:Agrippa_Stare:1468259401189294150>

Most players will have similar skill level and similar available units, therefore close to 50/50, a few skilled ones will have above that and conversely some will have lower at the other tail end. Whenever someone wins, someone will have the lose, so you can’t have *most* people have a high win rate statistically.
And regarding why we have loss aversion(we react to losing more strongly than winning), I’d suggest reading a famous book written by Daniel Kahneman called Thinking, Fast and Slow
Oh no, problems with sex tokens…
paying for sex with playtime

in all pick mode your units composition and cards picks matters more than unlocking everything, this is not the same mode or remotely close to PVE and has a complete different meta. The same goes for drafting mode when you are making your selection picks. An algorithm and that logic you are saying is not 50/50 and a misinterpretation and misunderstanding, just because it is a 1v1 and someone has to take a win and someone has to lose, win rate percentages and Elo lose or gain does not reflect this and the algo matchmaking players has two modes for precise and not precise 

Also suggesting to reading a book does nothing to help your cause and makes you look stuck up, just explain loss aversion and highlight its core principle so when people and devs take your feedback, it will make you look more convincing instead of looking you are just here to complain and have verbose

Ultimately it will depends on the passion of the devs, wallets of the people and profitability of the game mode.

where your argument and persuasion loses and why it could get dismissed or not even addressed, is because nobody is forcing people to play PVP,

PVP is incentive based, and framing this as "draining our mental well being" lacks structure supporting what you are trying to argue for, and you do not address why people like PvP and dismiss it entirely on the basis of 

"theoretical peoples potential negatives feelings"

instead, it was better talking about how this game mode is more of a chore with the win requirement being too steep, which is a stronger argument in your first opening post 

otherwise, your argument just looks like someone complaining "why is it not easier to get the rewards in PVP with minimal effort" and the idea of "losing is heavily detrimental and loser mentality" with no merit and failing to realize it is a PvP mode that someone freely could choose to play or not, and they play the mode fully knowing it has a competitve nature?

When played it dealt far less damage than my normal flail

支持
is the Mythang shop music unlockable? was checking eveywhere but didnt seem possible

I can't say for everybody, but the moment I saw the Taboo quests was when, after over a year getting BP+monthly+a few other packs, I stopped being a paying player, and I'll stay this way until it changes (I hate to do it, because the new story is so awesome it gave me chills and I'd like to support the game, but it seems that BIAV really want to say that playing Morimens means also playing Traphase and I can't agree with that).

About the "not forced to play" and "incentive based", totally disagree. You are going through all PvP threads and should have seen many answers about this topic, but you seems thoughtful and reasonable enough, so I'll post again.

Nobody is forced to play the game in general, but they do it for rewards. When the ONLY WAY to get a set of rewards is behind PvP, I'm way more inclined to say it's forced than to say it isn't.
Specially when they are rewards that help account progression. I wouldn't have a single complain if they were Traphase related rewards.

If you keep track of me going through threads for some weird reason and cherry pick my interactions and ignoring the points i made where people haven't given a response that developers and players can work off with, 

Then you should know what you are saying is the same parrot and complaints that do not help the developers understand the flaws and issues; people are just emote and give nothing to work off with.

I am not sure what you mean here:
```but the moment I saw the Taboo quests```

If you want to talk about these so called rewards

```
"rewards that help account progression" 
"Traphase related rewards"
```

You should say what exactly those rewards are, to give a better idea to players and developers reading what you are trying to change? 

what rewards exactly? 

This would help you be less vague and more clear 


You mention
```
" BIAV really want to say that playing Morimens means also playing Traphase"
```

And to me it does not make sense if you cannot specify what rewards are you talking about, why is it "detrimental to the player experience" from you mentioning of it being rewards that help for account progression 
(see how hard this sentence is to follow?)

As a new player, what i can see you are talking about,

The 250 silver and 5 pure core from Traphase is the same given reward in Arcade 

Why should there be change if both have the same consistent incentive?


If so, even with the same incentive 

Saying you 
```I stopped being a paying player, and I'll stay this way until it changes```

And I have to mention it to you, does not help you, and makes you look and sound like an erratic spender,

```I hate to do it,...I can't agree with that```

I advocate with you to vote with your wallet is is the right thing to do,

But what you described and from what it looks, just because BIAV gave the same consistent incentives for another game mode and are looking into interest and feedback of it, you are quick to stop supporting the game.
the shop itself isn’t unfortunately :(

You also say

```because the new story is so awesome it gave me chills and I'd like to support the game```
``` I wouldn't have a single complain if they were Traphase related rewards.```

So this is to say, that you are a paying player who is focused on the story and also account progression, people are going to ask why do you care about Traphase if it is optional, that is also to further say, why is it the games fault, when you cannot control how much you care about irrelevant things knowing full well, you do not need to be 100% optimal to enjoy the game?


Are you advocating for and how to gain back your support, is to change the Traphase into Traphase only related rewards?

Are you advocating for you to make rewards that help account progression more available in the other game-modes as a possible solution?


What you have out of all the PVP related post i seen is something that finally has substance and I appreciate you taking your time to write this out despite the lack of condensing the call to changes to be done 

(which is why in this thread i think playing 5 matches is really agreeable-easy solution for the developers and my experience from enjoying PVP)

(I wish I knew how to make a pretty post like you do btw, clarity is way better)
I still waiting for a developer response in any of those threads.

Gave some suggestions, like giving the player an option to get the same reward (silver and pulls) playing another modes more times, or bot matches instead of PvP, also possible to change the quest to "play cards" instead of winning, many options to explore to solve the problem for anyone that doesn't want to engage with PvP.

How can you not understand what "the moment I saw the Taboo quests"? Go to the game Handbook, Traphase+P-Dive+D-Dive+HSR are on the Taboo quests tab.

Rewards: Morimens is a gacha game (it's also way more than that, it has RPG aspects like skills and levels). Silver and pulls are the building base of any account, you need awakeners. And for harder content, stronger awakeners.

Traphase related rewards: Traphase emotes are the current best example. But you can have many others, like unlocking Awakeners for Traphase by playing it, instead of the Gacha (or premium Battle Pass). A "Hall of fame". Players and devs can be creative about it and implement rewards that you can use in Traphase, but doesn't influence the PVE part of the game.

Arcade isn't PvP, not a good comparison.

I can be an erratic spender. When you said, on your reply to Jocolat, that it depends on the wallet of the people, I'm someone with a wallet willing to show that I don't agree with the current system.

I don't like going in a tangent, but you said that you are a new player. Don't know if you joined after or before the most recent Traphase event, but people just organize themselves to win trade because they don't like the mode, but want the pulls. Traphase is pretty much a copy of a game that went EOS, remade with Morimens characters. The story that you can unlock is quite touching, but again, that doesn't make me want to play PvP.

"Why do I care about Traphase if it's optional"
I care because it has time gated pulls and Talent materials.

Being 100% optimal or not is quite close to the point. It doesn't make sense for me, as a player that felt in love with Morimens because is an Anime looking, Lovecraftian Slay the Spire to play PvP so I can get rewards. Missing pulls and materials is bad.

I advocate for options. I wouldn't mind playing the PvE part of the game way more if that meant that I can avoid playing PvP.
I'd be totally fine with doing P-Dive every day instead of doing: P-Dive 3x a week (+) All pick every 2 weeks (+) Draft every 4 weeks.
She just keeps disappearing bro, not sure why

```How can you not understand what "the moment I saw the Taboo quests"? Go to the game Handbook, Traphase+P-Dive+D-Dive+HSR are on the Taboo quests tab.```

I didn't even know that tab was as thing, i just explore and check every modes, especially if a red dot comes up to see what is new



```implement rewards that you can use in Traphase, but doesn't influence the PVE part of the game.```

New players need silver and cores to unlock characters to build their line up more for "all pick", silver and cores make sense as the rewards here and are consistent with the other PVE modes

You still have not said which items are a big deal of being rewards in Traphase, is it just the silver and cores? or is it the ranked rewards that are diminishing in the cost benefit analysis vs other modes?



```Arcade isn't PvP, not a good comparison.```

Yes it is,  P-Dive, Arcade, PvP are not part of the main storyline of the game right? they are extra side content with incentives for players if they wish to try and play them out, i am not sure why you just dismiss this without elaborating

```I can be an erratic spender. When you said, on your reply to Jocolat, that it depends on the wallet of the people, I'm someone with a wallet willing to show that I don't agree with the current system.```

I already mentioned in the previous post, and I agree with what you said earlier,
But if i need to spell it out to you if you do not get it; 
because you present yourself as an erratic spender you do not look like you are a returning customer and this makes your feedback less palatable and not convincing to the people and possibly the developers, 
you make it come off as a Complaint post instead of "what BIAV business practices are turning you away as a customer so they know in the future what not to do"



```
...But you can have many others, like unlocking Awakeners for Traphase by playing it..

I advocate for options. I wouldn't mind playing the PvE part of the game way more if that meant that I can avoid playing PvP.
I'd be totally fine with doing P-Dive every day instead of doing: P-Dive 3x a week (+) All pick every 2 weeks (+) Draft every 4 weeks.
```

This is better and should be a post if you haven't made it, you already have all the ideas 

```I don't like going in a tangent, but you said that you are a new player. Don't know if you joined after or before the most recent Traphase event, but people just organize themselves to win trade because they don't like the mode, but want the pulls. Traphase is pretty much a copy of a game that went EOS```

I am a new player, pretty sure after the Traphase event, you should mention that game that went EOS too

```"Why do I care about Traphase if it's optional"
I care because it has time gated pulls and Talent materials.```

```Being 100% optimal or not is quite close to the point. 
It doesn't make sense for me, as a player that felt in love with Morimens because is an Anime looking, Lovecraftian Slay the Spire to play PvP so I can get rewards. Missing pulls and materials is bad.```

You contradict yourself again, you stopped being a paying customer so you are no longer "100% optimal or not"

And lets disregard this, so you ignore :
you did not play the game earlier, 
miss an event 
could not grind hard enough, 
place on a higher rank in PvE 
miss exclusive codes

But Traphase being optional is somehow an issue when it is clearly not marketed towards your PVE preferences? it is inconsistent with your thinking if you are truly saying "Being 100% optimal or not is quite close to the point."

```I still waiting for a developer response in any of those threads.```

Go figure,  

It is just

Low effort post, it is like people are using chatgpt, 
spamming the same rhetoric i have to wonder if these people are bots, they do not even think before they type
Not proofreading and making logical sense in their post,

People just venting in their post and not giving workable solutions and developer feedback,


I wouldn't blame them if they just skim it and don't bother responding if there is not a lot of people coming to a consensus with something to work off with it


```I don't like going in a tangent, but you said that you are a new player```

Guess im done then

Yes, new players need awakeners for All Pick, agree with that, and even though it's completely possible to have many solutions in the future, this is currently a problem that you can only solve by playing the other parts of the game (or paying).

The big deal are mainly Silver and Cores, yes. Personally, I also disagree with how the ranked rewards are implemented, but talking about this may require another post non-PvP related.

P-Dive follows the same rules you play when you join the game. When you launch Morimens the game gives you a tutorial on how to play it, basically, Slay The Spire rules with Exalt+Posse, that you use for the entirety of Arc 1. D-Dive and Arcade have Arc 2 rules that you learn after finishing the first part of the game. In both, you have events with options that you can choose, stores with relics that you can decide to buy or not, option to sacrifice HP, decisions to save HP or sacrifice HP to save Keyflare and Aliemus for the next fight, it's possible to modify your cards, delete or add cards to your deck during an investigation. Traphase not only miss most if not all of those topics, but is also PvP.

根據超限描述
每消耗10點狂氣就額外觸發3%中毒
因此理論上來說狂氣上限為500的熔朵使用超限爆發會在狂氣爆發基礎50%觸毒之上額外觸發150%的中毒

所以我們看附件2
500狂氣上限的熔朵
理論應為200%觸發中毒
但開狂後能發現觸發的中毒並沒有2倍那麼多
仔細計算一下
原本的84796中毒加上熔朵開狂施加的3613中毒
觸發88409中毒後的傷害為97250
這不是只有110%的觸發中毒嗎
？
我缺的90%觸發誰給我補啊

還有順便說一嘴
熔朵打防的狂氣沒有跟著狂氣上限一起提高

Saying I'm an erratic spender after I already said that I played the game for over an year getting Moonphase Vigil (daily silver for a month)+BP doesn't seems reasonable. Stopped paying when timed rewards for Traphase are implemented (this update) also doesn't seem erratic to me, I would compare with having a subscription that I canceled, but we can disagree on this one.

Every season, BIAV sends an email to your game account that you can give feedback and suggestions. I've sent similar suggestions many times before, but agree with you. Posting in this discord, with a clear wording like you did may get better results.

If your starting argument on this post is that the optimal paying customer gets everything possible in the store, I'll disagree because it's possible to get only the most efficient packs. Also possible to take the best offers possible for your budget. Saying it's not optimal because I'm not getting everything isn't really reasonable, specially when we're talking about money. Also possible to be optimal F2P.

I don't get what any of your listed topics about being optimal have to do with PvP. Ok, they're related to optimal play and it's subjective, but I was optimal in most of them. There are things in the past that we can't change, I can only be optimal in the game the moment I start playing it (BIAV does a great job re-running events and also made many old event WoDs available in the shop BTW, some past resources are just lost, some of them you can get).

Yes, I'm against Traphase content being obligatory part of resources acquisition because it doesn't feel like the rest of the game (explained when it's compared with other non-story modes above).
Isn't this cause of realm mixing?
there is no damage penalty for mixing in singularity ultra, if not some dmg amp
I mean, the problem is that it takes more than 5 months of dailies to unlock all of the side stories even without any of the Frenzy stories...
如题怎么有一天发现全没了我求你了我真的想要
Placing Thousand Mirage created in hand in ultra space removes its additional effect while the copy originally created there still has it.
